reviewed_sources.evidence_excerpt: The page groups offices into broad regions like Alaska Peninsula, Northern Alaska, Southcentral Alaska, Southeast Alaska, and Southwest Alaska, but does not assign boroughs or census areas to those offices.
Raw HTTP fetch still returns HTTP 403 with Cloudflare challenge headers and the title "Just a moment...".

reviewed_sources.authority: Alaska Department of Family and Community Services
reviewed_sources.evidence_excerpt: The page links Adult Public Assistance and Apply for Medicaid with statewide 888-804-6330 phone routing, not borough or census-area office assignments.

reviewed_sources.authority: Alaska Department of Family and Community Services
reviewed_sources.evidence_excerpt: The public search page is live, but bounded public-assistance queries still produce no role-bearing DPA, public-assistance office, or borough-assignment result.

county_local.blocker_summary: Reviewed official Alaska county-local lanes still do not preserve any public borough- or census-area-to-office assignment contract for DPA routing.
